# PERF-211 negative: use a positive WHERE list instead of NOT IN
lang: go
file: PERF-211-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "gorm.io/gorm"

type User struct {
	gorm.Model
	Name string
}

func FindUsers(db *gorm.DB, ids []uint) ([]User, error) {
	var users []User
	err := db.Where("active = ? AND id IN ?", true, ids).Find(&users).Error
	return users, err
}
